stem: A scatterplot in the xy-plane has 6 data points trending up from left to right. A line of best fit passes through the approximate coordinates (0, 5), (6, 11), and (10, 15). Which of the following equations best represents the line of best fit shown?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. Slope = (11 − 5)/(6 − 0) = 1; y-intercept = 5. So the line of best fit is y = x + 5.

The other choices have wrong sign of slope or y-intercept.
